raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a fraud claim in XXXX of XXXX and XXXX of XXXX. 

My fraud case numbers are : XX/XX/XXXX : XXXX XX/XX/XXXX : XXXX Both cases have been deemed fraudulent. 

During the investigation period, I received email and letters telling me to make payments or else my credit score will be affected. I made multiple payments in person at a Macy 's store during the investigation period in the amount of {$650.00}. I have the receipts for those payments and those payments were posted on my Macy 's account. I received a check for around {$230.00} dollars in the mail when the fraud claims were deemed fraudulent. However, I have not received the remaining amount that I paid. I called in XXXX and again last week. I am still owed the remaining amount of payments I made during the investigation period.
